creator: indigo23@gmail.com
text:
I did a backtrace several times, from both Gnome (2.16.2) and KDE
(3.5.4_3).  You can view the results here:

FF2 in Gnome 2.16.2:
http://freebsd.pastebin.com/833379

FF2 in KDE 3.5.4_3:
http://freebsd.pastebin.com/833380

You will notice that the apparent cause of the problem
(libgtk-x11-2.0.so.0) is similar in both cases.
